What Triggers It: File upload via GUI or API
What It Does: Auto-assigns exhibit number (EX-XX-XXX), timestamps, files in correct folder, logs in tracker, tags to cases
Scans all deadlines, fires alerts at 7/3/1 day marks and overdue, pushes to advocate dashboard
Assembles court packet, agency complaint, press summary, or attorney bundle — applies redactions, generates PDF/ZIP
Creates ZIP snapshot, optionally pushes to GitHub (Bradleycrowe), logs in version control tracker
Finds connections across your 5 cases — same management behavior, same timeline gaps, same violations
Creates role-scoped access links for Dena, attorneys, tenants — controls who sees what
